description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized pralsetinib as a monotherapy treatment for adult patients with RET fusion-positive advanced non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) who have not previously been treated with a RET inhibitor.

contributions.description: Adding EMA approvals for use to database

contributor.name: Van Allen lab
contributor.description: Van Allen lab, Dana-Farber Cancer Institute

contributions.description: On 2024-10-24, the European Commission withdrew the market authorization for Gavreto (pralsetinib) in the European Union at the request of the marketing authorization holder, Blueprint Medicines (Netherlands) B.V., due to their decision to permanently discontinue the marketing of the product for commercial reasons.

indication.indication: Gavreto is indicated as monotherapy for the treatment of adult patients with rearranged during transfection (RET) fusion-positive advanced non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) not previously treated with a RET inhibitor.
